spec.name: The Edge Of The Forest
spec.description: You are standing at the end of a dusty road, near the eastern edge of the large forest of Haon-Dor. To the east you see the road heading back to the walled city, Midgaard, and to the west is a narrow trail leading through the forest.

east.description: To the east a dusty road takes you back to the walls of Midgaard, and its large west gate.

west.description: You see a narrow forest trail winding westward in between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The forest trail winds westwards through the trees.
The trees are quite tall considering most of them appear to be quite young. On one of the trees, crude letters forming the word 'Haon-Dor' have been carved into the bark.
